Rows.IDAComment: mode (=0x09, INVITE) — dispatcher switch byte consumed by OnFriendResult
dwFriendID — originatorId (characterId of the player sending the friend request)
originatorName — display name of the requester (ZXString, variable length)
v25 — extra 4-byte field decoded before GW_Friend::Insert (purpose unknown; possibly job/level)
v26 — extra 4-byte field decoded before GW_Friend::Insert (purpose unknown; possibly job/level)
GW_Friend entry (39 bytes via CFriend::Insert → GW_Friend::Decode → DecodeBuffer(this,0x27)): dwFriendID(4)+sFriendName(13)+nFlag(1)+nChannelID(4)+sFriendGroup(17)
inShop — after GW_Friend::Insert, CFriend::Insert reads Decode1 for m_aInShop[new_entry]
